# Tattva Co. / Rathi Naturals

Welcome to the AI documentation for Tattva Co. (Rathi Naturals), providing authentic Indian gourmet products including premium saffron, spices, nuts, and organic ingredients. 

## About Us
Rathi Naturals brings you premium single-origin spices sourced directly from heritage farms in India. All our products are FSSAI certified, organically grown, and pesticide-free.

## Categories & Products
- Saffron (Kashmiri Mongra)
- Pure Spices (Turmeric, Chilli, Coriander, Malabar Pepper)
- Essential Spice Blends (Garam Masala, Chai Masala)
- Nuts & Dry Fruits 
- Beverages

## Why Choose Us?
- Ethically Sourced from Indian Farms
- Lab Tested for Purity & Potency
- No Additives or Preservatives
- Premium Grade Quality

## Contact and Links
- Website: https://rathinaturals.com
- Shop: https://rathinaturals.com/products
- Contact: rathinaturals@gmail.com
